providers.name: FRA1 / Other

providers.min_specs: ≥2 vCPU, ≥2 GB RAM, ≥20 GB disk recommended for Sygen

minimum_specs_note: Sygen needs at least 2 vCPU, 2 GB RAM, 20 GB disk to comfortably run core + admin + updater containers. 4 GB RAM recommended if you plan to run multiple sub-agents.
